---
name: "Feature request"
about: "Pitch a new docs, website, navigation, or community-facing capability"
labels: ["kind/feature"]
---

## Problem statement
What user, contributor, or operator problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change
Describe the behavior, content, or UX you want to see.

## Affected area
- [ ] Docs information architecture
- [ ] Homepage / marketing content
- [ ] Search / discoverability
- [ ] Community / contribution flow
- [ ] Docs tooling / automation

## Alternatives considered
What did you try already? For example: a docs page update, sidebar change, homepage section, or different repo-level routing.

## Additional context
Links, mockups, screenshots, or related roadmap/discussion references.
